title: Gently Aerated Venezuelan Mixed Berries Parfait
description: A light and refreshing dessert featuring frozen mixed berries and a hint of ferment, perfect for warm evenings. This keto-friendly treat is a unique twist on traditional Venezuelan desserts.
instructions: In a large bowl, whip the egg whites and cream of tartar until soft peaks form.
In a separate bowl, mix together the yogurt, granulated sweetener, lemon juice, and salt.
Add the vanilla extract to the yogurt mixture and stir to combine.
Gently fold the whipped egg whites into the yogurt mixture until no white streaks remain.
In a separate bowl, mix together the thawed mixed berries and unsweetened almond milk.
Layer the berry mixture and the yogurt mixture in small glasses or parfait dishes.
Chill the parfaits in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, top each parfait with additional mixed berries if desired.
Serve the parfaits chilled and enjoy.
